fields.summary: Building Power BI dashboards and SQL reporting that turn raw student data into actionable insights for academic advisors and leadership.
fields.highlights:
Designed Power BI dashboards covering enrollment, retention, GPA, and DFW rates.
Wrote T-SQL views against the institutional data warehouse so other teams can reuse the same definitions.
Ran a metric-definition workshop with academic-affairs stakeholders to align conflicting definitions of retention.

fields.summary: Led a team of cloud security engineers operating production AWS environments at scale.
fields.highlights:
Owned operational tempo, incident response posture, and engineering practices for the production AWS environment.
Mentored engineers on hardening IAM, secrets management, and defense-in-depth patterns.
Owned the team's on-call rotation and post-incident review process.

fields.summary: Engineered and supported large-scale telecom infrastructure deployments for carrier-grade networks.
fields.highlights:
Carrier-grade telecom infrastructure deployment and support.
Multi-country technical delivery on production rollouts.

fields.summary: Delivered BSS/OSS platforms across multi-country deployments, integrating billing, customer management, and operations systems for telecom operators.
fields.highlights:
Delivered BSS/OSS platforms across multi-country deployments.
Integrated billing, customer management, and operations systems for telecom operators.

fields.summary: Built and operated telecom platform integrations, working closely with carriers on production rollouts.
fields.highlights:
Built and operated telecom platform integrations.
Worked directly with carriers on production rollouts.

fields.summary: Designed and supported systems integrations as part of a small, hands-on engineering team.
fields.highlights: Designed and supported systems integrations in a small engineering team.

fields.summary: Taught core ICT coursework, mentoring students entering the technology workforce.
fields.highlights:
Taught core ICT coursework to students entering the technology workforce.
Mentored students on career and technical skills.

fields.school: Baylor University · Hankamer School of Business
fields.details: Focused on the intersection of applied AI and cybersecurity — secure cloud architecture, AI/ML systems, and the governance practices that surround them. Concurrently working part-time at Baylor as a Student Success Support Specialist, building Power BI dashboards and SQL reporting for academic advising.
